description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form with two stories. The front facade is dominated by large, dark-tinted glass windows and sliding doors, framed by white and light gray walls, and a continuous balcony with a glass railing on the upper floor. The lower portion of the building is accented with a brown brick or stone base, adding texture and contrast to the otherwise minimalist design. The side elevations show tall, narrow windows and a solid white upper story, while the rear facade has symmetrical floor-to-ceiling windows and doors. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on open views and natural light. The structure is likely constructed from concrete, glass, and steel, with interior spaces designed for residential living.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist white and gray exterior accented by a brown base.
description_view_0: The front view showcases expansive glass windows and doors, a full-width balcony with a glass railing, and a prominent white overhang.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals tall, narrow windows and a solid white upper story, with a partial view of the balcony cutout.
description_view_2: The rear view displays symmetrical floor-to-ceiling windows and doors, with a simple, clean facade and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with tall, narrow windows and a visible balcony cutout, emphasizing the building's geometric form.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
